chat.errorHint: The local engine didn't return the conversation list.
chat.attachmentsFailedDropped: $n attachment(s) failed to upload and weren't sent
chat.transcriptErrorHint: The local engine didn’t return the messages.

tool.notParked: This node isn't awaiting a decision (already decided, timed out, or a wrong node id) — this decision had no effect.
tool.nodesShown: showing $shown/$total nodes, full set in the flowrun
tool.inboxEmptyState: Inbox empty — no run is awaiting approval
tool.wfMorphNote: incremental change (full graph in the entity panel)
tool.skillNoRevert: whole overwrite · no version to revert to
tool.trgCreateNote: created but not listening — an active workflow reference starts it
tool.contentTruncated: content truncated — see the full text in the entity panel
tool.skillPreauthNote: allowedTools are pre-authorized (no danger confirm) for this run when active
tool.noteRevertFn: restores code/IO/deps only; name·desc·tags do not follow versions
tool.noteRevertHd: restart triggered to run the new version; memory state cleared — see the handler panel
tool.noteKill: listening stopped; killed runs are cancelled — see flowruns
tool.noteStage: runs once on the next real trigger, then auto-unstages
tool.noteConfig: restart triggered to take effect; see the handler panel
tool.noteMetaHandler: no new version, no restart, memory state preserved
tool.noteDraining: in-flight runs finish then stop; to abort now use kill_workflow
tool.bashBgHint: poll with BashOutput, or KillShell to terminate
tool.bashHeadTruncated: output too long — head dropped, tail kept
tool.bashSessionGoneHint: may have been terminated / cleaned up / backend restarted
tool.firePayloadNote: Payload is always {manual:true}; see the trigger log for fan-out and disposition
tool.agentTrajectoryNote: The trajectory streamed live; replay it from the execution record
tool.parkRunCaption: a run parked on an approval node stays running at the header
tool.subagentTraceNote: The trajectory streamed live only — replay it with get_subagent_trace
tool.subTraceNoRuns: No subagent runs in this conversation

gate.approveAlwaysHint: Don't ask again for $tool this conversation (forgotten on restart)

chat.contextCompactedCount: Context compacted · $n earlier messages folded into the summary

stage.title: Sidestage

a11y.gate: The AI is waiting on you
a11y.failed: The operation failed; the stage holds

stage.castEmpty: This conversation hasn't touched anything yet
stage.castEmptyHint: Things the AI creates, edits or runs are recorded here
stage.prefixKept: first $n chars match the old version · fast-forwarded

run.replayPinNote: Re-run under the originally pinned versions; edits made after the failure do not take effect
run.batchDecideBody:
These approvals will be decided (first decision wins):
$list

scheduler.railErrorHint: The backend didn't answer. Check the connection and retry.
scheduler.underConstruction: The Scheduler command center is being built (S1–S5).

overview.kpiRunningA11y: Running: $n. Show them in the running-now list.
overview.kpiWaitingA11y: Waiting on you: $n. Show them in the waiting list.
overview.kpiFailed24hA11y: Failed in the last 24h: $n. Show them in the failed-runs list.
overview.kpiNextFireA11y: Next fire in $d. Show it on the schedule track.
overview.trackTruncated: More is scheduled inside this window than the track can show.
overview.failuresEmpty: No consecutive failures in the last 7 days.
overview.cancelConfirmBody: $name · $id will be cancelled; parked approvals are withdrawn.
overview.batchCancelBody:
These runs will be cancelled; parked approvals are withdrawn:
$list
overview.firstUseBody: Build a workflow in Entities and give it a cron trigger — or just tell the conversation "fetch the data at 8 every morning and send it to me".
overview.errorHint: The backend didn't answer. Check the connection and retry.
overview.kpiMissedA11y: Missed · 24h: $n. Show them on the schedule track.
overview.trackPastTruncated: Fires earlier than $at are not shown — the ledger holds more than one page.
overview.trackLaneSummaryA11y: $name, $n runs in 24h: $ok ok, $fail failed, $missed missed; next $next

home.notFoundHint: It may have been deleted. Pick another workflow from the rail.
home.killBody: Stops listening, cancels every in-flight run and deactivates the workflow.
home.replayBody: Re-runs $failed failed nodes · reuses $completed completed results.
home.replayBodyUnknown: Re-runs the failed nodes; completed results are reused.
home.notReplayable: This run is no longer replayable
home.batchReplayBody: Re-runs $failed failed nodes in total · reuses $completed completed results.
home.noGraph: The active version has no graph.
home.pauseBody: No new firings will be produced; in-flight runs are not affected.
home.matrixRowSummaryA11y: $node, row $r of $total, reached in $n runs, $failed failed

run.notFoundHint: It may have been cleared by the retention policy. Pick another run from the workflow.
run.errorHint: The backend didn't answer. Check the connection and retry.
run.graphNotPinned: Couldn't load this run's pinned version — the graph below is the workflow's CURRENT one and may differ from what this run walked.
run.graphEmpty: This run's topology isn't available — its pinned version couldn't be read, and the workflow has no current graph either.
run.ganttEmpty: This run has no nodes to place on a timeline yet.
run.ganttNoSpan: Every node landed within the same millisecond — the bars show ORDER only, not duration.
run.noSelection: Pick a node to inspect it.
run.relayFailedHint: No run with this id in this workspace. Check the id, or pick a run from a workflow.

range.weekdays: Mo Tu We Th Fr Sa Su

cast.ribbonLive: Listening live · settle follows the truth
cast.ribbonGap: Stream gap · trust the execution record
cast.ribbonFailed: Draft unsaved · truth is still the last version

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.errorHint: The local engine didn't return the notification feed.

startup.crashedHint: The backend didn't start. For development, set ANSELM_BACKEND_URL to an already-running server (make -C backend run).
startup.errorHint: An unexpected error occurred while rendering this view.

entities.errorHint: The local engine didn't return the entity list.
entities.selectHint: Choose a function, handler, agent, or workflow from the rail.

cockpit.noRunsHint: Each run appears here once the workflow is triggered

state.noLogsHint: Runs will appear here once this entity is executed.
state.noActivationsHint: Every time this trigger acts — fired or not — a row appears here.
state.noFiringsHint: When a fire fans out to a workflow, its disposition shows here.
state.errorHint: The local engine didn't return it.

editor.title: Graph editor
editor.discardConfirmMessage: The graph has edits that haven't been saved. Leaving now discards them.
editor.inspectorEmpty: Select a node or edge to edit
editor.portHint: A control port must match a branch name; approval is yes/no
editor.errSelfLoop: No self-loops: a node cannot connect to itself
editor.errBackEdgeSource: A back edge may only leave a control / approval node
editor.errApprovalPortsFull: An approval has only yes / no outputs
editor.inspectorEmptyHint: Pick a node or edge on the canvas to edit it.

run.payloadObject: Payload must be a JSON object.
run.inboxEmptyHint: Approvals waiting for a decision will appear here.

graph.selectHint: Select a node to inspect its relations.

coldStart.errorHint: The local engine is reachable but the workspace didn't resolve.

library.editorHint: Start writing, or press / for commands
library.errorHint: The local engine didn't return it.
library.pickHint: Choose a document or skill on the left to read or edit it.
library.deleteDocBody: “$name” and everything nested inside it will be removed.

props.title: Properties
props.name: Name
props.agentHint: Subagent type to dispatch — required for a fork skill.
props.toolPickerHint: Pick from below, or type a scope like Bash(git:*) and press Enter.
props.toolPickerEmpty: No matches — press Enter to add what you typed.
props.emptyHint: Select a document or skill to see its properties.

library.linkHint: Type or paste a link, Enter to apply
library.skillModeTooltip: Toggle rich / raw source editing of the manifest
library.skillLocallyModified: Local edits exist — updating will overwrite them. Force update?
library.skillInstallHint: GitHub repo (owner/repo or URL) or a tarball URL
library.skillInstallNone: No installable skills in this source
library.skillInstallPreauthNote: These tools will request confirmation-free pre-approval — inactive until you explicitly approve
library.skillCsvCapped: Showing the first $n rows — switch to source or open with the system for the rest
library.skillFontSample: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
library.skillFontNote: Font specimen preview — edit with a system app

settings.title: Settings
settings.buildingHint: This panel lights up slice by slice.
settings.zoomDesc: Scales the whole UI, synced with ⌘+ / ⌘− / ⌘0
settings.fontUiDesc: The whole interface. Bundled = Inter + MiSans (bilingual, identical on every machine); System = your OS font (macOS San Francisco · Windows Segoe UI). Applies after a restart.
settings.fontContentDesc: Chat message text and the document body only. Serif = Source Han Serif (Latin + 简体中文). Applies instantly.
settings.fontCodeDesc: Every monospace surface — code blocks, terminals, diffs, ids. Applies after a restart.
settings.languageDesc: Sets both the UI language and this workspace's AI output language
settings.rememberWindowDesc: Restore the last window geometry on launch
settings.updateCheckDesc: Query GitHub Releases on launch; never installs by itself
settings.notifLevelDesc: Which events pop up — items that need your action are always delivered
settings.notifOsDesc: Delivered via the OS notification center while unfocused
settings.notifToastDesc: Show notices at the top of the app; danger-level errors bypass this
settings.silentHint: Silenced — important items still land in the bell inbox
settings.autoStageDesc: The right island stages tool runs automatically
settings.webFetchDesc: Local fetch is more private; the Jina proxy reads dynamic pages better

keys.freeUnavailable: Gateway day budget exhausted — back tomorrow
keys.freeEnableHint: Registers this machine's anonymous fingerprint with the Anselm gateway for a quota
keys.freeFailed: Provisioning incomplete (offline or gateway unreachable) — retry later
keys.rotateWarn: Replacing takes effect immediately; the old key can't be recovered
keys.rotatePlaceholder: Leave empty to keep the current key
keys.scenarioDialogueDesc: The chat reply model; Auto depends on it — can't be cleared
keys.notConfiguredWarn: No default chat model set — chats cannot start
keys.searchDefaultDesc: Used by the WebSearch tool (category=search keys)
keys.noCapsGuide: No usable models yet — add a key that passes its probe first

ws.name: Name
ws.dangerBody: Permanently deletes everything in “$name”: $conversations conversations · $entities entities · $documents documents · $blob of attachments.
ws.runningWarn: $n runs in progress — deleting terminates them immediately
ws.generatingWarn: $n conversations are generating replies — deleting interrupts them
ws.lastOne: The only workspace can't be deleted

about.cantCheck: Couldn't check for updates (offline or nothing published yet)
about.diagDesc: Copies version and environment info for bug reports
about.fontsCredit: Bundled: Inter, MiSans, JetBrains Mono, Source Han Serif SC, Fira Code, Cascadia Code, Newsreader. MiSans © Xiaomi Inc., used under the MiSans Font License; the rest under the SIL Open Font License.

mem.name: Name
mem.nameLocked: The name is the filename — immutable
mem.invalidName: Must start with a lowercase letter; only a-z 0-9 - _ (≤64)
mem.pinTip: Pinned memories ride every conversation's context
mem.deleteBody: Physically deletes the file for “$name”. This can't be undone.
mem.emptyLead: Add your first memory — a fact the assistant recalls across conversations

mcp.name: Name
mcp.addFailedHonest: A failed connection still lands as failed — reconnect later
mcp.importHint: Paste a Claude Desktop mcpServers snippet
mcp.marketEmptyLead: Install your first MCP server from the marketplace

storage.retentionDesc: Settled runs older than this are cleared. Statistics and failure aggregation windows (7d) are unaffected.
storage.resetPrefsDesc: Clears this machine's UI preferences (theme/window/zoom…) only — never touches workspace data. The app will restart to apply the reset.
storage.factoryWarn: Stops the engine, permanently deletes the ENTIRE data directory (all workspaces / conversations / entities / documents / keys) and relaunches the app.

limits.scopeNote: Machine-wide — every workspace edits this machine's single set of limits
limits.resetAllTitle: Reset every limit to its default?
limits.errorHint: Couldn't read the limits config from the engine

network.proxyHint: Outbound proxy — AI requests reach LLM / MCP / search providers through it
network.saved: Saved — fully effective after an engine restart
network.restartNote: The proxy fully takes effect after restarting the engine

sandbox.deleteRtBody: Deletes “$kind $version”; rejected if envs still reference it.
sandbox.inUse: Envs still reference this runtime — clear them first
sandbox.envRebuild: Rebuilt automatically on the next run
sandbox.gcDays: Reclaim envs idle for more than N days

shortcuts.hintModifier: A chord must include a modifier (⌘/Ctrl…)

settings.capsuleFailuresDesc: Failures and crashes pop the band capsule
settings.capsuleApprovalsDesc: Pending approvals pop an actionable block on the band
settings.capsuleAttentionDesc: Attention events (streaks, broken references) pop the band capsule
